testcase.name: test_create_pos_from_rilievo

failure.message: AssertionError: POS should have linked_rilievo_id assert None == 'ril_71c8a75490a3' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb2f83c2fc80>('linked_rilievo_id') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb2f83c2fc80> = {'ai_risk_assessment': None, 'cantiere': {'address': 'Via Roma 123', 'city': 'Milano', 'committente': 'Mario Rossi Costruzioni', 'coordinatore_sicurezza': '', ...}, 'client_id': 'cli_09e155c8e43c', 'client_name': 'Mario Rossi Costruzioni', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_module_bridge.py:268: in test_create_pos_from_rilievo assert data.get("linked_rilievo_id") == rilievo_id, "POS should have linked_rilievo_id" E AssertionError: POS should have linked_rilievo_id E assert None == 'ril_71c8a75490a3' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb2f83c2fc80>('linked_rilievo_id') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfb2f83c2fc80> = {'ai_risk_assessment': None, 'cantiere': {'address': 'Via Roma 123', 'city': 'Milano', 'committente': 'Mario Rossi Costruzioni', 'coordinatore_sicurezza': '', ...}, 'client_id': 'cli_09e155c8e43c', 'client_name': 'Mario Rossi Costruzioni', ...}.get
